scope: GCC (Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman) + Israel + Levant (Jordan, Lebanon, Iraq). EXCLUDES Egypt (see Africa) and Turkey (analyzed separately).
signature: Value without count — the structural inverse of Africa. Low transaction count, extreme value per transaction (SWFs, oil settlement, high-value remittances).

consumer-cards.notes: Saudi mada alone processed 8.9B txns in 2024 (~282 TPS). Saudi blended non-cash retail = 12.6B txns (79% of retail electronic). UAE card VALUE Dh511.4B (+13.3% YoY), counts estimated from value/avg-ticket. High average ticket sizes across the Gulf.

sources.citation: WhiteSight — Saudi Digital Payments Boom (mada 8.9B txns 2024)
Khaleej Times — UAE card transactions Dh511.4B 2024

bank-transfers.notes: Central-bank-built instant rails. sarie 593M txns/yr (50% CAGR); Aani 6x YoY growth, ~25k P2P/day; Bahrain Fawri+ ~410M/yr; Fawran nascent. All top-down sovereign infrastructure, not startup-driven.

digital-wallets.notes: Wallet activity largely overlays card and instant rails (de-duplicated into those categories). STC Pay is the largest domestic wallet. Figure is gross before overlap netting.

sources.citation: PaymentBrief — Saudi Mada, SARIE & STC Pay

bill-payments.notes: SADAD reached ~364-500M+ txns in 2024 (8% CAGR). Dominant Saudi bill-payment rail.

remittances.notes: OUTSIZED VALUE, small count. UAE sent AED 183B (~$50B) in 2024; Saudi comparable. GCC is the world's largest remittance ORIGIN by value. India received $129.4B in 2024, much Gulf-sourced. ~28M migrant workers in GCC.

sources.citation: Khaleej Times — UAE AED 183B outward remittances 2024

equity-markets.notes: Tadawul ADV ~$1.5B, ~$3T market cap, 239 main-market listings. Regional exchanges are high-value but low by trade count vs India/US. Estimated combined ~500-800k trades/day.

interbank-rtgs.value_share_note: ~5x the count share — oil settlement and wholesale flows
interbank-rtgs.notes: High value, low count. Oil exports (~18M bbl/day GCC) settle in large infrequent wholesale transactions. UAE + Saudi participate in Project mBridge multi-CBDC bridge.

saudi-arabia.role: Regional digitization engine. Vision 2030 state program. Fastest cash-to-digital transition recorded.

uae.role: Financial + remittance capital. Highest value density. mBridge participant.

qatar.role: Small wealthy population. Fawran instant rail nascent.

kuwait.role: KNET debit monopoly. Comparatively cash-heavy for income level.

bahrain.role: Highest per-capita instant-payment intensity in region (BenefitPay/Fawri+).

israel.role: Developed economy, high card usage, TASE. Often analyzed separately from Gulf.

levant.role: Largely cash. Jordan JoMoPay; Lebanon dollarized crisis economy; Iraq Qi Card government rails.

sovereign_wealth.notes: Near-zero transaction COUNT, extreme value per transaction. The purest value/count decoupling in the Universe of Finance — the exact inverse of African mobile money.

sources.citation: SWF Institute — Sovereign Wealth Fund Rankings

confidence.notes: Saudi data excellent (SAMA/Saudi Payments publish systematically) and very recent (2024/2025). UAE value data strong but transaction counts derived from value/avg-ticket (medium). Smaller Gulf switches (KNET, OmanNet) and the Levant do not publish annual counts — estimated from card base and GDP (low). SWF flows are directionally certain but transaction-count-invisible. Coverage penalized for Levant opacity and count-vs-value estimation uncertainty. Recency is a strength this run — most figures are 2024/2025.
